title: Heartbeat
description: A single coding heartbeat sent from a WakaTime IDE plugin to the WakaTime API v1. Heartbeats are the atomic unit of WakaTime — every dashboard, summary, stat, goal, and leaderboard entry is computed from heartbeats.

user_id.description: WakaTime user identifier owning this heartbeat.

entity.description: File path, domain name, or app name that generated the heartbeat.

type.description: Nature of the entity that emitted the heartbeat.

category.description: Activity category attributed to this heartbeat (auto-detected by the plugin or set by a custom rule).

time.description: Unix epoch seconds (with milliseconds) when the heartbeat was generated.

project.description: Project name (typically the git repo name).

project_root_count.description: Distance from the project root in directory levels.

language.description: Programming language detected for the entity.

dependencies.description: Detected package dependencies referenced from the entity.

lines.description: Total line count of the file at heartbeat time.

is_write.description: Whether the heartbeat was triggered by a write/save action.

machine_name_id.description: Identifier of the machine that emitted the heartbeat.

user_agent_id.description: Identifier of the WakaTime editor user-agent that emitted the heartbeat.

created_at.description: Timestamp when WakaTime received the heartbeat.
